summary: Registers CRM navigation groups and toolbar surfaces in the app shell.

outputs.description: Shell registration object for CRM navigation and actions.

notes: Use when wiring CRM into the shared shell.

summary: Lists CRM contacts with reusable filtering and pagination.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema access.

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: Optional page, pageSize, search, status, organizationId, and ownerProfileId filters.

outputs.description: Paginated CRM contacts plus total counters.

notes: Prefer this helper over dashboard-shaped CRM payloads when building app-owned contact tables and search.

examples.label: Load the first page of contacts
examples.code: const result = await listCrmContacts(supabase, { page: 1, pageSize: 50, status: "lead" });

summary: Lists CRM organizations with reusable search and pagination.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema access.

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: Optional page, pageSize, and search filters.

notes: Use for app-owned CRM organization lists and selectors.

summary: Returns contact counts grouped by status.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema access.

outputs.description: Total CRM contact count plus counts by status.

notes: Use for app-owned CRM overview cards and summaries.

summary: Lists staff and admin owner options for CRM assignment flows.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema access.

outputs.description: Deduplicated owner options derived from staff and admin role assignments.

notes: Use for app-owned CRM filters, assignment pickers, and ownership forms.

summary: Lists profile records suitable for CRM primary-contact selectors.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with profile table access.

notes: Use only when a page needs primary-contact selector data; contacts and stats can be loaded without it.

summary: Lists recent CRM status-change timeline entries with contact and actor labels.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema and profile access.

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: Optional since timestamp and limit override.

outputs.description: Recent CRM status-log entries normalized with display labels.

notes: Use for progressively loaded CRM timeline sections without forcing the full dashboard payload.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM contact listing.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request with optional CRM contact query parameters.

outputs.description: JSON response containing a CRM contacts list payload or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

examples.label: Mount the contacts endpoint
examples.code: export async function GET(request: Request) { const { handleCrmContactsGetRequest } = await import("@brightweblabs/module-crm"); return handleCrmContactsGetRequest(request); }

query.name: pageSize
query.description: Page size capped at 100. Defaults to 50.

query.name: search
query.description: Case-insensitive search across first name, last name, email, and phone.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM organization listing.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request with optional organization query parameters.

outputs.description: JSON response containing a CRM organizations payload or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

query.name: pageSize
query.description: Page size capped at 100. Defaults to 20.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM contact status stats.

outputs.description: JSON response containing CRM status stats or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

success.description: Total CRM contacts plus counts by status.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM owner options.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request for CRM owner options.

outputs.description: JSON response containing owner options or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

success.description: Deduplicated owner options for staff and admin profiles.

summary: Starter dashboard helper that bundles the current CRM page payload.

outputs.description: Starter CRM dashboard payload for the current scaffolded page.

notes: Replace or compose this helper when a project needs a different CRM page shape.
